title: Lifetime Donor Member
description: Apply as a lifetime donor member and support sustainable initiatives.

left.heading: How To Become a Lifetime and Donor Member
paragraphs: Lifetime donor membership allows you to contribute to long-term institutional development.
Your support helps us expand mosques, community services, and education initiatives.
You become part of a consistent impact model that benefits future generations.
left.highlight_title: What will be available at As Minha Foundation Mosque Complex and Islamic Center:
highlights: Human welfare and non-government community services

form.title: Membership Application
form.description: Complete the application form to register as a lifetime donor member.
form.minimum_donation: Minimum Donation of 1000 Dollar, You Can Donate More if Desired
